assignments.literal: """CLI: ``eval`` (HF samples or ``--repo``), ``demo`` (single file / toy). From repo: ``python .../eval/run_v2.py eval``."""
"""Stage 2: optional R01–R05 (comments, blanks, ws, docstrings, indent). R04/R05 are lossy."""
"""Stage 3: Score(w)=ΔT/(I(w)+ε); map high-score tokens to <VAR>/<STR>/… placeholders."""
"""When True, only **low-risk** docstrings are removed (AST-based, see ``docstring_removal_mode``)."""
"S3be = stage3_backend; S3voc = stage3 vocab intro (corpus-once union for legacy placeholders)"
